prompt:
Theme Direction: Oriental Zen Minimalist Illustration
Style Branch: High-contrast communication type
Main Subject: A small flower observer standing under flowering branches
Emotional Motif: Vitality, brightness, seasonal sense
Scene and Imagery: Carmine flower branches, emerald green leaves, blank background, tiny figure, extremely faint distant mountains
Composition and Space: Corner-aligned white space composition, flowering branches entering from the top or side, characters located in the lower corner, large areas of white space forming a title area
Color Control: Warm white as the base, emerald green for foliage and a few distant views, carmine for the flowers, ink blue for branches and character outlines; avoid coloring the background red or green
Light and Texture: Bright natural light, rice paper texture, ink bleeding, clear graininess
Aspect Ratio: 9:16
Additional Requirements: Flower colors should be saturated and vivid, but the scene must not be flashy or cluttered, suitable for seasonal and cultural posters.
